sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98111" key="sukomore/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῡκομορ-έα</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῡκομορ-αία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">συκόμορος</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg003.perseus-grc1:19:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ev.Luc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19.4</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
